'''tangadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachwoman|coachwoman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachwoman|coachwoman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tangadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængædhæth|tængædhæth]] || [[word:tængædhæj|tængædhæj]] || [[word:tængædhæsh|tængædhæsh]] || [[word:tængædhæ|tængædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangangadhath|tangangadhath]] || [[word:tangangadhaj|tangangadhaj]] || [[word:tangangadhash|tangangadhash]] || [[word:tangangadha|tangangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tangadhath|tangadhath]] || [[word:tangadhaj|tangadhaj]] || [[word:tangadhash|tangadhash]] || [[word:tangadha|tangadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tangafdhath|tangafdhath]] || [[word:tangafdhaj|tangafdhaj]] || [[word:tangafdhash|tangafdhash]] || [[word:tangafdhaf|tangafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tangadhatha|tangadhatha]] || [[word:tangadhaja|tangadhaja]] || [[word:tangadhasha|tangadhasha]] || [[word:tangadhaka|tangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tangadhath|tangadhath]] || [[word:tangadhaj|tangadhaj]] || [[word:tangadhash|tangadhash]] || [[word:tangadha|tangadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tangadhathal|tangadhathal]] || [[word:tangadhajal|tangadhajal]] || [[word:tangadhashal|tangadhashal]] || [[word:tangadhakal|tangadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tangadhathatha|tangadhathatha]] || [[word:tangadhajaja|tangadhajaja]] || [[word:tangadhashasha|tangadhashasha]] || [[word:tangadhaka|tangadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tangadhathan|tangadhathan]] || [[word:tangadhajan|tangadhajan]] || [[word:tangadhashan|tangadhashan]] || [[word:tangadhakan|tangadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tangadhathaoro|tangadhathaoro]] || [[word:tangadhajaoro|tangadhajaoro]] || [[word:tangadhashaoro|tangadhashaoro]] || [[word:tangadhakaoro|tangadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
